descripcion: Normative hierarchy for Chile applicable to data protection

niveles.label: Constitution
niveles.nota: Article 19 No. 4 recognizes the right to protection of personal data (reformed by Law 21.096 of 2018).

niveles.label: Constitutional Organic Law
niveles.nota: Requires 4/7 quorum. Relevant for institutional framework of the supervisory authority.

niveles.label: Ordinary Law
niveles.nota: Law 19.628 on Protection of Personal Data (reformed by Law 21.719) sits at this level.

niveles.label: Regulation (Supreme Decree)
niveles.nota: Executive regulations implementing the law. The regulation for Law 19.628 reformed is pending issuance.

niveles.label: Agency Resolution
niveles.descripcion_local: Resolución de la Agencia de Protección de Datos Personales
niveles.nota: Resolutions issued by the APDP once operational. The Agency is created by Law 21.719 with full powers from December 2026.

niveles.label: Supervisory Authority Pronouncement
niveles.nota: Non-binding interpretive guidance. Historically issued by the Council for Transparency and the Civil Registry in their respective competences.

niveles.label: Jurisprudence
niveles.nota: Court decisions applying data protection provisions.
